title: Epitaph On An Army Of Mercenaries
content:
These, in the day when heaven was falling,
    The hour when earth�s foundations fled,
    Followed their mercenary calling
    And took their wages and are dead.

    Their shoulders held the sky suspended;
    They stood, and earth�s foundations stay;
    What God abandoned, these defended,
    And saved the sum of things for pay.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Alfred Edward Housman, titled "Epitaph On An Army Of Mercenaries", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
